text: Now let me compile all the information and make a decision.

function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "investigate", "action_id": "ask_guard_radio", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": -0.3, "adjustment_reasons": ["Hand-set prior with n=0 — no learned weight, free to adjust", "Zero precedents — novel pattern means higher uncertainty", "Raw data shows 'background: true' flag, suggesting possible benign radio chatter"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.35, "what_would_change_my_mind": "If the guard confirms the flag was just background chatter/routine transmission, I'd adjust downward and suppress. If the guard reports something unusual (sounds, voices, activity), I'd commit to notify_guard or escalate."}
